name: appstoreconnect-mcp
description: StoreOps MCP tools for the App Store Connect API.

interface.shortDescription: Automate App Store Connect workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: StoreOps MCP adds a local stdio MCP server for authenticated App Store Connect API workflows. Credentials are read from environment variables.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use StoreOps App Store Connect tools to inspect apps, builds, versions, and API resources.
